_doc: Synthetic fixtures hand-authored from the invoke-vba-trust-access playbook signature. Replace with verbatim captures from a real .local/investigations/ before treating as a regression signal (see ../_shared/scripts/generate_scenario.py).

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key b2c9d4e7-3a8f-4b1d-9e5c-7f0a2b3c4d5e --state Faulted --output json
or jobs logs d3f1a2b8-4e6c-49d7-8f1a-2b3c4d5e6f70 --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
